name: Candied Banana Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix the beaten egg, flour, cornstarch, and water to form a smooth batter.
2. Slice the bananas into 1/2-inch-thick pieces and coat them with the batter.
3. Deep-fry at 360 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 seconds in two batches. Remove and drain each batch before returning the oil to temperature.
4. Fry the remaining banana slices all at once until they are golden brown.
5. Heat the peanut oil and sugar in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook until the sugar dissolves and turns a very light golden color.
6. Coat the fried banana slices in the syrup, then place them in a serving bowl with cold water and ice cubes. Serve immediately so that the bananas remain hot and the syrup crystalizes.
7. Use a fork or spoon to remove each serving of banana slices from the water before serving. This recipe serves 6 to 8 people as dessert.
